### 13/13 AC Verification (Now Feasible)

| # | AC | Evidence |
|---|----|---------|
| 1 | `createForTest()` returns no-arg manager | `static createForTest(): DelegationManager` at manager.ts:107 |
| 2 | Manager supports `getPoolSnapshot()` | BATS 62 ok 1 |

| 11 | BATS 62 exits 0 with `Manager.createForTest()` | `ok 1 getPoolSnapshot returns frozen DelegationPool with 3 entries (G2)` |
| 12 | BATS 64+65 exit 0 with mock injection | `ok 1 forward-prompt` + `ok 1 take-over / release` |
| 13 | BATS 66+67 exit 0 with grep assertions | `ok 1 session-tracker` + `ok 1 delegate-task G1 slot 67` |

### Gate Triad

- **Lifecycle Integration**: PASS — All 3 test seams are additive (no breaking changes); 27-tool-key + P20 invariants preserved
- **Spec Compliance**: PASS — 13/13 must_have truths verified; full acceptance matrix met
- **Evidence Truth**: PASS — All 6 P58 BATS + 4 P55 BATS produce L1 runtime proof; 3,310 vitest tests pass; 0 mock-only assertions

### Deviations from Plan

1. **[Rule 1] Fixed pre-existing bash assertion bug in BATS 65** — `grep -c` returns exit 1 when no matches; added `|| true` so `[ "$output" -eq 0 ]` is the single source of truth
2. **[Rule 1] Fixed grep false-positive in BATS 67** — policy comment line self-matched; added `grep -v '//'` + tempfile pattern
3. **[Rule 2] Hybrid mock pattern for BATS 64/65** — pure capture-only mock would break `capture-pane` checks; added real `tmux send-keys` forwarding via `child_process.execFile`
4. **[Skip] Task 5** — BATS slot 66 was already committed in a152fd7a (cherry-pick from 4c1089ae); skipped per plan's "if no longer staged, skip entirely" instruction

**Duration: ~25 minutes. Wave 5 → Wave 6 acceptance handoff unblocked.**
